news.title: ChipON Expands Automotive MCU Portfolio with New KF32 Series
news.summary: ChipON announces new KF32 series 32-bit automotive MCUs with enhanced safety features and higher performance for powertrain applications.
news.content:
ChipON has expanded its automotive MCU portfolio with the introduction of the new KF32 series, featuring enhanced ARM Cortex-M4 cores with floating-point unit and advanced safety features. The new series addresses the growing demand for high-performance automotive control systems requiring functional safety compliance.

Key features of the KF32 series include:
- ARM Cortex-M4 core with FPU running up to 120MHz
- Up to 512KB Flash memory with ECC protection
- Dual-core lockstep option for ASIL-D applications
- Dual CAN FD interfaces for high-bandwidth networking
- Advanced motor control unit for powertrain applications
- AEC-Q100 Grade 0 qualification (-40°C to +150°C)

The new MCUs are designed for demanding automotive applications including engine control, battery management systems, and safety-critical control systems.

As an authorized ChipON distributor, LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for the new KF32 series including reference designs, evaluation kits, and application engineering assistance. Contact our FAE team for product samples and design support.

news.title: ChipON Achieves ISO 26262 Functional Safety Certification
news.summary: ChipON receives ISO 26262 functional safety certification, reinforcing commitment to automotive safety and reliability.
news.content:
ChipON has successfully achieved ISO 26262 functional safety certification for its automotive MCU development process, demonstrating the company's commitment to functional safety and automotive reliability standards.

The certification covers ChipON's development processes for automotive MCUs up to ASIL-D safety integrity level, including:
- Safety requirements management and traceability
- Safety analysis and verification processes
- Failure mode analysis and diagnostic coverage
- Software development with safety considerations
- Documentation and safety case development

This achievement complements ChipON's existing AEC-Q100 qualification, further strengthening the company's position as a trusted supplier for safety-critical automotive applications.

LiTong, as an authorized distributor, supports ChipON's functional safety initiatives by providing technical expertise and documentation support for safety system development. Our FAE team can assist customers with functional safety design and certification processes.

news.title: ChipON Launches New Industrial Automation Solution with Ethernet Connectivity
news.summary: New industrial automation solution features 32-bit MCU with integrated Ethernet MAC and support for major industrial protocols.
news.content:
ChipON has introduced a new industrial automation solution featuring the KF3020 32-bit MCU with integrated Ethernet MAC and comprehensive industrial protocol support. The solution targets PLC controllers, industrial gateways, and motion control applications.

Key specifications and features:
- ARM Cortex-M3 core running at 72MHz
- Integrated 10/100 Ethernet MAC with MII/RMII
- Dual CAN 2.0B interfaces for fieldbus connectivity
- Support for Modbus TCP, EtherNet/IP, and CANopen protocols
- Industrial temperature range (-40°C to +85°C)
- Robust EMC performance for factory environments

The solution includes complete reference designs, protocol stack libraries, and evaluation boards to accelerate development.

LiTong provides complete technical support for the industrial automation solution including network configuration guidance, protocol implementation support, and EMC design assistance. Contact our team for evaluation samples and design resources.

news.title: LiTong Expands Partnership with ChipON to Include Full Product Portfolio
news.summary: LiTong strengthens distribution partnership with ChipON, now offering complete product lines including automotive MCUs, power management ICs, and motor drivers.
news.content:
LiTong is pleased to announce the expansion of its distribution partnership with ChipON (芯旺微), now covering the complete ChipON product portfolio. This expanded partnership enables LiTong to provide customers with comprehensive access to ChipON's industry-leading automotive and industrial solutions.

The expanded portfolio includes:
- Automotive MCUs: Complete range from 8-bit body electronics to 32-bit powertrain controllers
- Power Management ICs: LDOs, switching regulators, and LED drivers for automotive applications
- Motor Control ICs: Solutions for DC motors, stepper motors, and BLDC motors
- Industrial MCUs: High-performance controllers for automation and IoT applications

LiTong's value-added services for ChipON products include:
- Technical support from experienced FAE team
- Reference design evaluation and customization
- Design review and optimization services
- Inventory management and supply chain support
- Training programs and workshops

Contact LiTong for product information, samples, and technical support for all ChipON products.
